name: xmlui-supabase-tasks
description: XMLUI application using supabase. The application uses a middleware proxy server auth.js to handle authentication and API calls.

scripts.clear-tokens: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const os = require('os'); const tokenFile = path.join(os.homedir(), '.xmlui-books-tokens.json'); if (fs.existsSync(tokenFile)) { fs.unlinkSync(tokenFile); console.log('Tokens cleared successfully'); } else { console.log('No token file found'); }"
